title: Ensure iptables-persistent is not installed with ufw

prose.en: Ensure iptables-persistent is not installed with ufw

description.en: The `iptables-persistent` is a boot\-time loader for netfilter rules, iptables plugin

rationale.en: Running both `ufw` and the services included in the iptables\-persistent package may lead to conflict

audit.en:
Run the following command to remove the `iptables-persistent` package:

```
# apt purge iptables-persistent
```

remediation.en:
Run the following command to remove the `iptables-persistent` package:

```
# apt purge iptables-persistent
```
